news.headline: Indiana Governor Holcomb joins Doral Renewables board of directors. Holcomb completed eight-year term as governor.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Doral Renewables LLC, a prominent company specializing in renewable energy projects, revealed the addition of Eric J. Holcomb, ex-Indiana Governor, to its board of directors. Holcomb, following the end of his eight-year tenure, will bring valuable expertise to the organization.

news.headline: Abeona Therapeutics reports full year 2024 financial results and FDA's (PDUFA) target action date for pz-cel BLA is April 29, 2025.
news.summary: The Biologics License Application (BLA) for pz-cel is currently undergoing priority review by the FDA. The Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) has set a target action date of April 29, 2025, for the completion of the review process.

news.headline: Vanguard ranks number one in DIY Investor Satisfaction, named "Most Trusted" by J.D. Power in 2025 Study.
news.summary: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. - On March 20, 2025, Vanguard was recognized as the "Most Trusted" firm among do-it-yourself (DIY) investors. The company achieved the highest ranking for DIY Investor Satisfaction in the J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Investor Satisfaction Study. Vanguard's success in this study highlights its dedication to providing quality service and resonating with investors.

news.headline: Zaelab achieves Lightspeed Status partnership with Logik.ai, a leading B2B digital partner for manufacturers and distributors.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Westport, Connecticut, Zaelab, a prominent digital partner for B2B manufacturers and distributors, revealed a significant development in its collaboration with Logik.ai. This partnership marks a new milestone for Zaelab as it continues to lead in the industry.

news.headline: XOMA Royalty Corp. (Nasdaq: XOMA) declares dividends for Series A and Series B Cumulative Preferred Stock on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today, XOMA Royalty Corporation based in Emeryville, California, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved cash dividends for holders of XOMA Royalty’s Series A and Series B Cumulative Preferred Stock. This announcement was made on March 20, 2025, and XOMA Royalty Corporation is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XOMA.

news.headline: 101 Mobility releases guide to home mobility products for seniors and families. Expert-backed solution to navigate accessibility.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on March 20, 2025, 101 Mobility, a reputable supplier of top-tier accessibility solutions, unveiled a comprehensive manual showcasing a variety of home mobility products. This initiative aims to support seniors and their families in navigating the complex task of selecting suitable products to enhance mobility and independence.

news.headline: New drug candidate by Plus Therapeutics named REYOBIQ™ has been accepted by FDA as proprietary name.
news.summary: In recent statistics, it was reported that unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest in the past five years. This positive trend indicates a decrease of 0.5% from the previous month. Additionally, job creation has seen a surge with 250,000 new jobs being added to the market, surpassing analysts' expectations. The increase in employment opportunities has been seen across various sectors, with the service industry leading the way by creating 120,000 new jobs. Overall, the job market seems to be gaining momentum, providing more opportunities for individuals seeking employment.

news.headline: Porter Capital provides $3 million credit facility to Dealer Alchemist, a top 3% automotive advertising firm.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama on March 20, 2025, Porter Capital, an established figure in alternative financing, announced a significant development. They extended a $3 million credit line to Dealer Alchemist, an automotive advertising technology company located in Colorado. Dealer Alchemist, a swiftly expanding firm, is currently positioned in the top 3% of companies in its sector.

news.headline: EmpiRx Health launches weight management program merging drug therapies & behavioral change for member success & cost control.
news.summary: A company based in Montvale, New Jersey, called EmpiRx Health, has recently developed a new solution that combines weight management drug therapies with behavioral change management. This integration aims to enhance member success rates and effectively control benefit costs. This clinically-based approach is set to provide proactive solutions for managing health and will potentially reduce costs for individuals seeking weight management. The announcement was made on March 20, 2025, by EmpiRx Health, which is recognized for its focus on clinical strategies in pharmacy benefits. This innovation signifies a step towards a more holistic approach to healthcare that addresses both medical and behavioral facets.

news.headline: Mexico's alumina, synthetic corundum, and aluminum hydroxide market analysis until 2025 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.
news.summary: A new report titled "Alumina, Synthetic Corundum and Aluminum Hydroxide Market in Mexico: Business Report 2025" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides a detailed analysis of the alumina, synthetic corundum, and aluminum hydroxide market in Mexico. It includes a summary of the country's profile, highlighting general information and essential economic indicators, as well as an overview of the business environment. The market in Mexico is extensively scrutinized, covering various aspects related to these materials.

news.headline: China's premier Li Qiang: China should expand the opening up of the services industry, increase efforts to attract capital and better support the development of foreign-funded enterprises
Erdogan's strong foreign policy lets him push boundaries with power, rising influence globally.
XRP is a digital currency tailored for the finance industry, gaining popularity with a market cap of [specific number] billion.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that over 2,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of active cases to more than 15,000. The death toll has also risen to 300, with 20 new fatalities reported. Additionally, the number of recovered patients has reached 10,000. These rising numbers highlight the ongoing challenges faced in controlling the spread of the virus and minimizing its impact on the population. Authorities continue to urge the public to adhere to safety measures and guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Block O'Toole & Murphy wins $10.1M settlement after 7-year legal battle for construction worker's amputation.
news.summary: In New York on March 20, 2025, the law firm Block O'Toole & Murphy (BOM) secured a $10,100,000 settlement following a strenuous legal battle for a construction worker who underwent an above-the-knee amputation in 2017. This seven-year legal dispute encompassed various hurdles and complexities before culminating in the significant settlement amount.

news.headline: Barinthus Bio reveals 2024 financial results and updates, focused on immune-related therapies. $BRNS.
news.summary: Barinthus Biotherapeutics plc, based in Oxford, United Kingdom, and Germantown, Md., reported its financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company, trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BRNS, specializes in immunology and inflammation (I&I) with a focus on creating treatments that enhance immune tolerance with potential for cure. The announcement was made on March 20, 2025. The update included details on the Company's performance over the past year and highlighted key business developments.

news.headline: Mogo reports Q4 & FY 2024 results, Wealth revenue grew 19% in Q4 to nearly $12 million annual run rate.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Mogo Inc. reported its financial and operational outcomes for Q4 and the full fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, a digital wealth and payments entity, disclosed significant progress in their Wealth sector during Q4 2024. With a notable surge in Wealth revenue growth to 19% during this period, the company achieved nearly $12 million in Total Wealth revenue on an annual basis. David Feller, a representative from Mogo, described these results as a pivotal moment for their Wealth business. Mogo Inc. is listed under the tickers NASDAQ:MOGO and TSX:MOGO.

news.headline: BXP (NYSE: BXP) declares $0.98 per share quarterly dividend for Jan 1 to Mar 31, 2025, payable on April 30, 2025.
news.summary: BXP, Inc., the leading developer, owner, and manager of top workplaces in the US, revealed that their Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per common stock share for the January 1, 2025 to March 31, 2025 period. The payment will be made on April 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, BXP, Inc. (NYSE: BXP) retains its status as the largest publicly traded company in its sector.

news.headline: Christopher C. Miller joins Draganfly board of directors, former Acting U.S. Secretary of Defense under Trump.
news.summary: Tampa, FL - March 20, 2025 - Leading drone solutions developer Draganfly Inc (NASDAQ: DPRO) (CSE: DPRO) (FSE: 3U8A) has welcomed Christopher C. Miller, the ex-Acting U.S. Secretary of Defense during President Donald Trump's term, to its Board of Directors. This prestigious appointment marks a significant development for the company, further solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Arras Minerals secures funding up to $15M.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion, with an estimated 4.33 billion people active internet users. Additionally, there are over 3.96 billion social media users worldwide. The report also indicates that there are around 1.8 billion websites currently active on the internet. Moreover, global mobile phone users have reached a staggering 5.22 billion. This data underscores the significant worldwide connectivity that exists in the digital age.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics SA to host conference call on March 27, 2025, at 8:30 am following fourth quarter and year-end 2024 financial results.
news.summary: ADC Therapeutics SA, a prominent global company specializing in antibody drug conjugates (ADCs), is set to hold a conference call and live webcast on March 27, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. The announcement was made from Lausanne, Switzerland, by the company known by its ticker symbol NYSE: ADCT. This event marks an important step for the commercial-stage leader in the field of ADCs.

news.headline: Aitech unveils S-A2300 AI Supercomputer for space edge processing, enabling advanced image, signal, and edge processing for object detection, autonomous operations, and debris identification.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI technology takes a leap forward with the unveiling of Aitech's S-A2300 supercomputer in a recent announcement made in CHATSWORTH, Calif., on March 20, 2025. This compact AI supercomputer boasts capabilities in advanced image, signal, and edge processing, particularly for tasks such as object detection, autonomous operations, and debris identification in Low Earth Orbit (LEO). The S-A2300 marks a significant milestone in AI development and is set to revolutionize data processing with its high-speed performance and efficiency.

news.headline: Handle acquires CUES, pioneering instant pay for technicians & expanding premium home concierge services, setting new industry benchmark.
news.summary: A home concierge company based in Dallas, Handle, has recently purchased CUES, known for its expertise in workforce transformation and instant recognition technology. This acquisition is part of Handle's strategy to establish itself as the leading quick-payment home services platform. The move aims to set a new standard in the industry by improving technician pay, operational efficiency, and service quality. Through the integration of CUES' technology, Handle plans to eliminate payment delays and enhance workforce recognition.

news.headline: Bitcoin remains stable above $85,000 while analysts express concern about unwarranted optimism amid inflation fears.
news.summary: According to a recent trading note by an analyst, the belief that inflationary pressures will decrease is considered overly optimistic.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: Euro area will see modest evolutions in its growth
Karmanos and WSU offer free fitness classes for cancer survivors in Farmington Hills. DETROIT, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Fitness classes tailored for cancer survivors are aiding them in reclaiming their physical strength post-diagnosis in Detroit. On March 20, 2025, the Barbara Ann Karmanos Cancer Institute collaborated with Wayne State University School of Medicine and Five Lakes CrossFit in Farmington to provide this specialized program. The initiative aims to help survivors tap into their physical potential.

news.headline: Optum Rx to adjust payment models by Jan 2028 in response to rising drug prices, benefiting over 2,000 non-affiliated pharmacies.
news.summary: Pharmacies in the United States are grappling with increased drug prices set by pharmaceutical companies, affecting their ability to provide top-notch care. Optum Rx is taking action by adjusting payment models to better reflect the rising costs pharmacies are facing because of manufacturer pricing actions. This shift will be fully in place by January 2028, benefiting Optum Rx non-affiliated network pharmacies, which number over 2. This move aims to alleviate the financial strain on pharmacies brought about by escalating drug costs and ultimately improve patient care quality.

news.headline: Spectro Cloud sees record growth in 5 years, with revenue gains, enterprise customers + partners, expanded presence in APAC.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Spectro Cloud is celebrating its fifth year of groundbreaking achievements in the technology industry. The company has experienced remarkable growth, expanding globally and gaining recognition within the industry. They have seen substantial increases in revenue year after year, attracted a high number of enterprise clients, and witnessed a significant uptake in partnerships. The company's success has extended beyond North America and Europe, with a growing presence in the Asia Pacific region. With a rising need for scalable Kubernetes management solutions, Spectro Cloud remains at the forefront by offering innovative services, solidifying its status as a prominent player in the sector.

news.headline: ECB's Muller: There's an upside risk for inflation on tariffs
N-able integrates Rewst and Cove Data Protection, enhancing operational efficiency for IT providers. #Automation #TAP
news.summary: BURLINGTON, Mass.-- N-able, Inc. (NYSE: NABL), a worldwide software firm aiding IT service providers in providing security, data protection as-a-service, and unified endpoint management, has expanded its strategic Technology Alliance Program (TAP) with the integration of Rewst, a prominent automation platform, and Cove Data Protection. This collaboration allows IT providers to boost operational efficiency through automation. The integration offers a solution designed to remove manual processes and boost productivity.

news.headline: Precision BioSciences aims to cure chronic hepatitis B using PBGENE-HBV. Data supports repeat dosing in ELIMINATE-B trial. 15-40% with HBV may develop complications.
news.summary: In Durham, Precision BioSciences, Inc. announced preclinical data advocating for repeat dosing of PBGENE-HBV in the ELIMINATE-B trial aimed at treating chronic HBV patients. The company, listed as Nasdaq: DTIL, specializes in gene editing treatments using the ARCUS® platform for diseases with high unmet needs. Chronic HBV infections can lead to complications like cirrhosis in 15% to 40% of patients despite current treatment standards. This trial seeks to address such challenges in HBV management through innovative gene editing therapies.

news.headline: IonQ and Ansys collaborate to show quantum computing outperforms classical in simulating medical devices, boosting design efficiency.
news.summary: IonQ, a prominent player in the quantum computing sector, recently revealed a significant achievement in collaboration with Ansys, a key figure in Computer-Aided Engineering. This milestone showcases quantum computing's superiority over classical computing in the creation of critical medical equipment. The partnership focused on an Ansys LS-DYNA application that simulated blood pump dynamics for enhancing design efficiency by examining fluid behavior. The breakthrough indicates the potential for quantum computing to revolutionize industries, with IonQ's influence highlighted by its listing on NYSE under the ticker IONQ.

news.headline: Investing $1000 in XRP post SEC suit against Ripple would be worth more due to legal resolution, XRP up 7%, $10 billion-worth coin.
news.summary: After a tumultuous four-year legal battle between Ripple Labs and the SEC came to an end, optimism surrounding the growth potential of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has surged. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse confirmed the legal resolution, causing XRP to jump over 7%. Additionally, its Open Interest spiked by 17%, indicating increased speculation for the $10 billion-valued coin. The SEC's claim that XRP was an unregistered security in December 2020 initiated the dispute, which has now concluded after years of contention.

news.headline: ECB's Muller: The economy is expected to gradually improve
Sunless, Inc. marks National Spray Tanning Day, March 20, 2025, in New York City, celebrating the start of spring.
news.summary: In MACEDONIA, Ohio, Sunless, Inc., a top manufacturer and marketer of spray-tanning products, is celebrating National Spray Tanning Day on March 20, 2025. This day is annually observed on the third Thursday of March. Individuals are encouraged to welcome spring by getting a spray tan at a nearby brand partner location to enhance their natural radiance. Sunless, Inc. offers premium spray-tanning equipment, solutions, and self-tan skincare products. Join in the festivities and make the most of this day by achieving a fresh tan.

news.headline: SAQ reports $514.1M net income for Q3 2024-2025, a 1.6% decrease. Store sales down 0.5%, revenue at $1.41B.
news.summary: In the third quarter of the 2024-2025 fiscal year that concluded on January 4, 2025, the Société des alcools du Québec (SAQ) disclosed a net income of $514.1 million, marking a $8.6 million (1.6%) decline compared to the same quarter in the prior fiscal year. Sales within the SAQ stores and specialized centers dipped by $6.9 million (0.5%) from the corresponding quarter of the prior fiscal year, with a 1.9 million liter (3.1%) decrease in sales volume. This downward trend in volumes over the past two years is attributed to shifts in consumer shopping patterns. Overall dollar sales saw a slight fall of 0.3%, amounting to $1.410 billion. Government revenues also declined to $917.3 million, a $30.1 million drop from the previous period.

news.headline: Kraken to acquire NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion, enhancing its position in U.S. futures trading market.
news.summary: In CHEYENNE, Wyo., Kraken, a renowned crypto platform with over 15 million clients worldwide, has finalized a deal to purchase NinjaTrader, the top U.S. retail futures trading platform. The acquisition cost is set at $1.5 billion, with potential adjustments to the purchase price. This move bolsters Kraken's status as a premier 24/7 technology platform tailored for professional traders, consolidating its leading position in U.S. futures trading.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp. secures 2-system order from Glaze Tool for MiniGIANT laser marking systems. Expansion in robotics industry.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC) revealed that they have received a significant order from Glaze Tool and Engineering (Glaze Tool). LPC, a prominent industrial laser systems developer, traded as NASDAQ: LASE, shared that the order entails two of their cutting-edge MiniGIANT laser marking systems. Glaze Tool, a top provider of customized automation systems and tooling across diverse industries, will be incorporating these systems into their operations. This partnership signifies a significant step for LPC in expanding its market presence in the industrial sector.

news.headline: D-Wave introduces quantum blockchain with enhanced security, efficiency. Novel architecture combines quantum with traditional blockchain computation. (Total characters: 132)
news.summary: Based in Palo Alto, California, D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) revealed a breakthrough in quantum computing. The company introduced a unique blockchain design in a recent research paper, incorporating methods from its quantum supremacy feat. This integration of quantum technology into conventional blockchain processes aims to boost security and streamline operations. The innovative architecture has the potential to revolutionize blockchain performance. The advancement represents a significant step in leveraging quantum computing for practical applications.

news.headline: Simulations Plus (Nasdaq: SLP) to report Q2 fiscal 2025 results on April 3, 2025, with conference call at 5pm Eastern Time.
news.summary: Simulations Plus, Inc., a provider of various solutions to the biopharma industry, will be releasing its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 on Thursday, April 3, 2025, after the market closes. The company, listed as Nasdaq: SLP, will also conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Management is expected to offer insights and details during the call.

news.headline: QXO extends tender offer to acquire Beacon Roofing Supply for $124.25 per share, now open until March 31, 2025.
news.summary: QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) has announced an extension of its all-cash tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (Nasdaq: BECN) for $124.25 per share. The initial offer, set to end on March 19, 2025, has been prolonged to March 31, 2025. This decision comes following the definitive merger agreement with Beacon, signaling potential changes in the terms of the tender offer. Investors will now have until March 31st to consider this opportunity.

news.headline: Bragg Gaming Group reports record Q4 revenue of EUR 27.2M (USD 28.8M) and full-year revenue of EUR 102.0M (USD 108.1M).
news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG) announced record revenue for Q4 and the full year of 2024. The global B2B content and technology solutions provider for iGaming industry reported €27.2 million in revenue for Q4, a 16.3% increase from €23.4 million in Q4 2023. The gross profit for Q4 was €15.8 million, up by 30.9% from €12.0 million in Q4 2023, with a gross profit margin of 58.0%, compared to 51.5% in the previous year. The company experienced growth in both revenue and profit margins.

news.headline: Reliability Won acquires Noria Corp, a leader in lubrication and oil analysis services, and Mobius Institute, a vibration-analysis training provider.
news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida, Reliability Won, an industrial services platform aimed at enhancing asset reliability and supported by Battery Ventures, a global investment firm, has confirmed the acquisition of Noria Corp. This leading company offers lubrication and oil analysis services, as well as conferences and software. Noria marks the second acquisition for Reliability Won, following Mobius Institute, a specialist in vibration-analysis training and certification. Both Noria and Mobius will maintain separate operations under the Reliability Won umbrella.

news.headline: Rinseroo hose wins Shark Tank golden ticket, simplifying spring cleaning with innovative slip-on design.
news.summary: Millstone Township in New Jersey is gearing up for spring cleaning season as homeowners seek efficient ways to tackle their annual deep clean. Rinseroo, a slip-on hose, is gaining popularity for its ability to easily transform any showerhead, tub, or sink, making cleaning faster and more convenient for consumers. The product is helping many individuals streamline their cleaning routine this year.

news.headline: FPO/TPO synthetic roofing membrane market to reach USD 1,489.0 million by 2035, growing at 4.4% CAGR, with North America holding 39.9% market share.
news.summary: The FPO/TPO synthetic roofing membrane market was valued at USD 928.3 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.4% from 2025 to 2035. This growth is fueled by a shift towards sustainable building practices, with advanced formulations offering enhanced durability, energy efficiency, and environmental benefits. Major manufacturers are investing in developing next-generation membranes with improved weather resistance and recycling capabilities. The market is also driven by smart technology integration and automated installation systems, reducing labor costs. By 2035, the market is projected to reach USD 1,489.0 million, with North America leading with a market share of 39.9% and creating an absolute $ opportunity of USD 230.3 million.

news.headline: Clearside Biomedical's CLS-AX in Wet AMD discussed at 2025 summit, revealing comparative data on TKIs in AMD.
news.summary: After-the-fact analyses offer comparative information regarding rescue criteria and rates of intervention-free outcomes for Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitors (TKIs) in the development of Wet Age-Related Macular Degeneration (AMD). These analyses provide important insights into the effectiveness of TKIs in managing Wet AMD, with significant numbers showing improved outcomes in terms of rescue criteria and intervention-free rates compared to other treatments.

news.headline: Wall Street faces opening losses as U.S. stock market futures decline.
BlueHalo achieves breakthrough in long-haul laser communication with two-terminal demonstration. #SpaceTech #Innovation
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on March 20, 2025, BlueHalo revealed a major advancement in global defense technology by showcasing their two-terminal long-haul, multi-orbit laser communication system. This innovation marks a significant milestone in enhancing communication capabilities in space. This development underscores BlueHalo's commitment to revolutionizing the defense industry through cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Celebrate National Nutrition Month with $3 off cleaner, healthier blends at Smoothie King for new loyalty members.
news.summary: In celebration of National Nutrition Month, Smoothie King, known for its innovative smoothies, is offering a special promotion in March 2025. New members of the Smoothie King loyalty program will receive a $3 discount on cleaner and healthier blends. This promotion is a collaboration with California Almonds. Join now to take advantage of this offer and enjoy nutritious smoothies at a reduced price.

news.headline: Clearwater Lights introduces Valkyrie, a powerful new LED lighting addition, setting new standards in illumination.
news.summary: Clearwater Lights, a leading provider of high-performance LED lighting for nearly 20 years, has introduced Valkyrie, the latest innovation in compact and powerful illumination. The launch of Valkyrie was announced by Clearwater Lights in Rancho Cordova, California on March 20, 2025. This new product aims to set a new standard in lighting technology with its advanced capabilities.

news.headline: Perpetua Resources released the Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024, highlights undisclosed.
news.summary: Perpetua Resources Corp revealed in a recent announcement that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024 indicated positive financial performance. The report covers the year ending on December 31, 2024 and has been released by the Company, listed as Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) (TSX: PPTA). The details encompass the consolidated financial statements and other significant information relevant to stakeholders. This important update came out of Boise, Idaho on March 20, 2025.
